descript.abstract: This polygon feature class contains the boundaries of 86 of 87 experimental forests, ranges and watersheds, including cooperating experimental areas.
descript.purpose: These data were prepared to show boundaries for all experimental forests, ranges, and watersheds managed by the US Forest Service (USFS) or in a cooperating agreement with the USFS. These data also provide spatial and descriptive attributes for each experimental area. The purpose of the data is to provide the location and descriptions of these experimental areas for Forest Service employees and the public.

idinfo.native: Microsoft Windows Server 2008 R2 Version 6.1 (Build 7601) Service Pack 1; Esri ArcGIS 10.3.1.4959

attracc.attraccr: As far as is known, experimental area boundaries and attributes are current as of 2017. Areas were calculated from the spatial data using the North America Albers Equal Area Conic projection and may not be the same as listed within each experimental area's records.

dataqual.complete: Currently missing the boundaries for Swanton Pacific Ranch, a cooperating experimental forest owned by California Polytechnic University. As far as is known, experimental area boundaries and attributes are otherwise complete as of 2017.

procstep.procdesc: The Southwest Region's shapefile of experimental forests and ranges was merged with polygons for all other experimental forest and ranges within US by Greg Arthaud in the Washington Office, with possible assistance from others.

Changed name of Harshaw Forestry Research Farm to Rhinelander Experimental Forest and added boundaries for Denbigh Experimental Forest and Kings River Experimental Watershed. Added contact information.

spdoinfo.indspref: Polygons representing the boundaries of experimental forests, ranges, and watersheds.

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

overview.eaover: This geodatabase contains the boundaries of 86 experimental areas including forests, ranges, and watersheds. It includes all associated cooperating experimental areas (areas that are not owned or managed by the US Forest Service). Currently the boundaries for the cooperating experimental forest Swanton Pacific Ranch are not included.

Attribute Defintions: “Name” = Name of experimental area “Type” = Experimental area type; values are: Experimental Forest Experimental Range Experimental Watershed Cooperating Experimental Area “State” = US state or territory in which the experimental area is located “Station” = US Forest Service research organization the experimental area is administratively part of; values are: NRS = Northern Research Station SRS = Southern Research Station RMRS = Rocky Mountain Research Station PNW = Pacific Northwest Research Station PSW = Pacific Southwest Research Station IITF = International Institute of Forestry “Established” = Year of official establishment [YYYY] “Land_Ownership” = Owner/manager of the experimental area “Lead_Scientist” = Name of lead scientist “Hectares” = Calculated area of experimental area in hectares based on the spatial data using the North America Albers Equal Area Conic projection “Acres” = Calculated area of experimental area in acres based on the spatial data using the North America Albers Equal Area Conic projection “Region” = US Forest Service administrative region; if the area is not part of the USFS, the value is "N/A" “Contact_Info” = Contact information for the experimental area; this usually refers to the lead scientist “Shape_Length” = Length of boundary, i.e. perimeter of boundary based on the spatial data using the North America Albers Equal Area Conic projection automatically calculated by a geodatabase [Meters] “Shape_Area” = Area of experimental area based on the spatial data using the North America Albers Equal Area Conic projection automatically calculated by a geodatabase [Square Meters]

cntorgp.cntorg: USFS Chief Information Office, Enterprise Data Warehouse

metainfo.metstdn: FGDC Content Standard for Digital Geospatial Metadata
